title: A Hop and a Skip Into Trouble

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's not gonna work, Kawakami! That tree is more than two stories tall!
Let's go get the custodian.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to get my report. I can just rewrite it. Imagine if you
fell and hurt yourself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now now, no need to worry! This is no problem for a princess. Getting
up that high'll be a piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I wanna be a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: All pretty and sparkly... I'll be adored by all.

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Stop picking on the smaller kids or I'll beat the snot outta ya!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's her—the berserk Umamusume! Run before she starts
punchin'!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: You're no princess, berserk girl! You're just crazy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I got a call again about her making another child cry. I don't
understand why she's so aggressive.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Father
text_block_list.text:
Well, she wants to be a princess, right? I say we give her some
examples of how a sweet little princess behaves.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Here, look at this. The princess in this book is well-behaved, isn't
she? If you want to become a princess, you'll have to be nice and
quiet like her.

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text:
(Hmph. You don't know anything, Mom. A real princess is someone
just like...)

text_block_list.name: TV Show
text_block_list.text:
"A princess is always beautiful, graceful, and courageous! I'm the
Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter!"

text_block_list.name: Young Kawakami
text_block_list.text:
See?! Even someone like me can be a princess! So I'm gonna be a
princess too—the strongest ever!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I'm going to become a princess—one who's beautiful,
graceful, and courageous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's still my first month as a new trainer at Tracen Academy, so I
decide to take a walk and get a better lay of the land.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Agh, h-hey! G-get outta the waaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A student comes rushing at me like a runaway train. She's going to
crash right into me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, amazingly, she pivots at the last moment and kicks off a wall,
leaping straight into the air!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was a close one. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? Gaaagh! Th-this is not good! What did I do?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You okay, Kawakami—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yikes! You made holes all over the wall!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I tried to stop you. But no, you had to charge right off,
Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I didn't mean for this. It's all wrong!
KAWAKAMI!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've really done it this time with your rampaging, Kawakami
Princess! Look at these giant holes in the school building—this is
unprecedented!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Eep! I'm sorry, it was an accident! But I had a big reason—bigger than
the ocean!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll hear all about your reasons in the student council office! Come
with me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Why meee?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Crud! We better follow 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what's going on, but I decide to find out at the student
council office where Kawakami Princess was taken.
choice_data_list: So what were you doing back there anyway?
So what were you doing back there anyway?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My report got stuck in a tree, and Kawakami was trying to get it for
me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We said it was dangerous, but she wouldn't listen...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So the damage inflicted to the wall was not intentional, and
you were merely attempting to help your friend?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's right... I just wanted to get this report down from the tree...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Scarlet stayed up all night writing it, so it's really important.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But a stupid breeze snatched it away! I'm a princess—I couldn't just
stand there and do nothing!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whatever your reason, why did you get so upset that you had to jump
up there? You could've looked for a ladder, and then none of this
would've happened.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But, well... A real princess doesn't need stuff like that... You know,
like the old saying goes.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: "When you're in a pinch, throw a punch!"

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is not a saying! And this isn't the first time. Just the other day, you—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy, she's really gettin' it. It's awesome that she can't leave a friend hangin', but those holes were majorly bad.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We should've tried harder to stop her. Though... Kawakami wouldn't
have listened anyway.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That was rough... Air Groove doesn't pull her punches.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Kawakami! What happened in there?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, you two... I told them it wasn't on purpose. They said the
student council will take care of repairs. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But what?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As punishment for giving the council all that extra work, I have to do
chores for them the whole day...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Starting with... taking down all the old posters in the entire buildiiing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So this is Kawakami Princess... She's really energetic—almost
alarmingly so.
